notes: Both with and without skill produce identical quality for core plugin patterns
Both correctly implement ContainerFactoryPluginInterface, 4-param create(), parent::__construct with 3 plugin params
Both use D11 attribute syntax, blockForm/blockSubmit, defaultConfiguration
Subtle difference: with-skill version includes #cache in empty-state return path; without-skill omits it in empty path
Block plugin DI patterns are well-known to Sonnet -- skill adds no measurable delta on current expectations
